seo.title: Home
seo.description: Qubi LLC develops modern mobile applications for children with a playful, premium and parent-trusted product experience.

hero.badge: Bright digital experiences for kids and families
hero.description: Qubi LLC develops child-focused mobile applications with a lively, modern and globally relevant design language. The homepage remains the brand showcase, while each application has its own dedicated detail page.

performance.title: Animated proof points that make the company feel alive.

parentConfidence.title: Why families keep choosing Qubi experiences

whyParents.title: A visual explanation of trust, not just another text block.
whyParents.description: Motion cards, icons and layout rhythm communicate why Qubi stands out for parents evaluating children’s apps.

cards.title: Safe by design
cards.text: Simple, calm and trustworthy interfaces for both children and parents.

cards.title: Parent-friendly experience
cards.text: Clarity and usability are present throughout the journey.

cards.title: Global product mindset
cards.text: Visual language designed to resonate with families worldwide.

teasers.title: Keep the homepage focused and move deeper company information into dedicated pages.
teasers.description: Qubi’s homepage should introduce the brand and product portfolio quickly. More detailed company, safety and contact information lives in separate pages for a cleaner browsing experience.

cards.title: Learn about the company behind the apps.
cards.text: Explore Qubi’s mission, product mindset and global brand direction in a dedicated company page.

cards.title: See how the brand communicates safety and parent confidence.
cards.text: Review the trust principles, safety positioning and reassurance language behind the Qubi experience.

cards.title: Get in touch for future launches, partnerships and questions.
cards.text: Use the dedicated contact page to reach Qubi for company, media or partnership inquiries.

featured.title: Clickable application showcase with automatic 5-second rotation.
featured.description: Visitors can click any application to focus it instantly, or let the homepage cycle through the portfolio automatically.
